description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine ownm_2, and is implemented by a call to ownm_2. Use this API routine to reassign the buses, load, machines, and branches in a specified subsystem of the working case from their original owner to a designated owner. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ownm(sid, all, status, ionew)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying They are used to control reassignment options. (input).

parameters.name: ionew
parameters.description: New owner to which the specified equipment items are to be assigned. ionew must be between 1 and 9999. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: bus owners to IONEW (0 by default).
load owners to IONEW (0 by default).
machine owners to IONEW (0 by default).
branch owners to IONEW (0 by default).
FACTS device owners to IONEW (0 by default).
change FACTS device owners to IONEW.
VSC dc line owners to IONEW (0 by default).
leave VSC dc line ownership unchanged.
change VSC dc line owners to IONEW.
branch, series FACTS device, VSC dc line option (1 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
owner table is full; cannot add owner to the working case.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
